abc_deployment: A, B, and C were deployed as three separate questionnaire forms
assignment_mechanism_author_confirmation: complete random allocation of participants among the three forms

export_observation.analysis_handling: primary GEE clusters by anonymous participant; a fixed single-form-participant sensitivity is reported

invalid_inference: participant randomization does not license corpus-wide generalization or a direct unchanged-text API-versus-human validity claim
item_sampling: six materials were purposively selected disagreement cases, not a probability sample of the 810-item corpus
text_relationship: the public materials are meaning-preserving popularized adaptations, not verbatim subsets of the upstream generated texts
valid_inference: randomized reader-response comparison among A/B/C adaptations for these six cases
